title: Helping disaster response teams turn AI into action across Asia
summary: AI for Disaster Response in Asia: OpenAI Workshop with Gates Foundation

title: Stability AI Joins the Tech Coalition
summary: We’re pleased to share that Stability AI has joined the Tech Coalition, a global alliance of leading technology companies working together to combat online child sexual exploitation and abuse.

title: Warner Music Group and Stability AI Join Forces To Build The Next Generation Of Responsible AI Tools For Music Creation
summary: Warner Music Group and Stability AI today announced a collaborative effort to advance the use of responsible AI in music creation, combining WMG’s long-standing advocacy for principled innovation with Stability AI’s expertise and leadership in commercially-safe generative audio.

title: Universal Music Group and Stability AI Announce Strategic Alliance to Co-Develop Professional AI Music Creation Tools
summary: Universal Music Group and Stability AI today announced a strategic alliance to develop next-generation professional music creation tools, powered by responsibly trained generative AI and built to support the creative process of artists, producers and songwriters globally.

title: Stability AI and EA Partner to Empower Artists, Designers, and Developers to Reimagine Game Development
summary: Stability AI and Electronic Arts (EA) have formed a strategic partnership to co-develop transformative generative AI models, tools, and workflows that empower EA’s artists, designers, and developers to reimagine how games are made.

title: Stability AI Brings Image Services to Amazon Bedrock, Delivering End-to-End Creative Control with Enterprise-Grade Infrastructure
summary: Today, we're excited to announce we’re expanding our partnership with Amazon Web Services to bring our Stable Image Services to Amazon Bedrock.

title: Stability AI’s Annual Integrity Transparency Report
summary: At Stability AI, we are committed to building and deploying generative AI responsibly, and we believe that transparency is foundational to safe and ethical AI.

title: Stability AI Introduces Stable Audio 2.5, the First Audio Model Built for Enterprise Sound Production at Scale
summary: We’re excited to release Stable Audio 2.5, our latest audio model and the first developed for enterprise-grade use cases. Stable Audio 2.5 introduces advancements in quality and control that address the demand for dynamic compositions that can be adapted for custom brand needs.

title: Stability AI and NVIDIA Bring Faster Performance and Simplified Enterprise Deployment with the Stable Diffusion 3.5 NIM
summary: We're excited to announce our collaboration with NVIDIA to launch the Stable Diffusion 3.5 NIM microservice, enabling significant performance improvements and streamlined enterprise deployment for our leading image generation models.

title: AWS and Cerebras Collaboration Sets a New Standard for AI Inference Speed and Performance in the Cloud >
summary: Products

title: Context Caching is Available 2024/08/02
summary: Both deepseek-chat and deepseek-reasoner have been upgraded to DeepSeek-V3.2.

title: New API Features 2024/07/25
summary: Both deepseek-chat and deepseek-reasoner have been upgraded to DeepSeek-V3.2.

title: AutoClaw launch
summary: Zhipu AI introduced AutoClaw, a product positioned as a fast way to equip computers with its AI agent capabilities in about one minute. It is presented as a named original product on the homepage.

title: GLM-5-Turbo announced
summary: Zhipu AI announced GLM-5-Turbo, a base model optimized for agent scenarios with stronger tool use and long-horizon execution. The page describes it as part of the company's new-generation full-stack large model system.

title: GLM-5 flagship model release
summary: Zhipu AI released GLM-5 as a new flagship foundation model for agent engineering, highlighting open-source SOTA performance in coding and agent capabilities. The homepage also cites strong benchmark results including SWE-bench Verified and Terminal Bench 2.0.

title: GLM-4.6V open-source vision reasoning model
summary: Zhipu AI announced GLM-4.6V, an open-source visual reasoning model described as delivering standout performance at the 100B-class level. It also supports tool calling and long-context processing up to 128K.

title: AutoGLM agent model launch
summary: Zhipu AI launched AutoGLM, an agent model with autonomous planning, reasoning, and execution capabilities. The company says it addresses task planning, data scarcity, and policy optimization challenges while enabling continuous self-improvement.

title: GLM-PC base model CogAgent-9B open-sourced
summary: On December 30, 2024, Zhipu AI announced that it open-sourced CogAgent-9B, the base model behind GLM-PC, to support the broader agent ecosystem. The model is trained from GLM-4V-9B and is designed for agent tasks using screenshots as input.

title: Agent OpenDay update: AutoGLM and GLM-PC progress
summary: On November 28, 2024, Zhipu AI shared major agent updates at Agent OpenDay, including AutoGLM performing more than 50-step autonomous operations and cross-app tasks. The company also said GLM-PC entered internal testing and highlighted broader cross-app and cross-device agent capabilities.

title: Partnership with Intel on AI PC products
summary: On November 7, 2024, Zhipu AI announced a deeper smart ecosystem partnership with Intel, delivering on-device versions of Zhipu Qingyan and the CodeGeeX coding assistant for AI PCs. The collaboration focuses on integrated cloud-edge model products and AI PC application innovation.

title: ByteDance Seed 2027 Foundation Model Campus Recruitment Opens
summary: ByteDance Seed announced that its 2027 Foundation Model Campus Recruitment program is now open, including internship opportunities. This is a company recruitment announcement for students interested in foundation model work.

title: Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview Released on Arena
summary: ByteDance Seed announced the release of Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview on Arena. The post indicates a preview availability of the model for public evaluation or comparison.

title: Seed 2.0 Official Launch
summary: ByteDance Seed officially launched Seed 2.0. This marks the formal release of a new generation model in the Seed lineup.

title: Seedream 5.0 Lite Introduced
summary: ByteDance Seed introduced Seedream 5.0 Lite, highlighting deeper thinking and more accurate generation. The announcement presents it as a new model release in the Seedream family.

title: Seedance 2.0 Official Launch
summary: ByteDance Seed officially launched Seedance 2.0. The announcement signals a major new release in the Seedance model series.

title: Seed Prover 1.5 Announced
summary: ByteDance Seed announced Seed Prover 1.5, describing it as an advanced mathematical reasoning model built with a novel agentic architecture. The release focuses on improved reasoning capabilities for math-related tasks.

title: Seed1.8 Official Release
summary: ByteDance Seed officially released Seed1.8, described as a generalized agentic model. The announcement positions it as a new model milestone in the company's agentic AI efforts.

title: Seedance 1.5 Pro Official Release
summary: ByteDance Seed officially released Seedance 1.5 Pro, promoted with the tagline 'Sound and Vision, All in One Take.' The launch suggests enhanced multimodal capabilities spanning audio and visual generation or understanding.

title: Baichuan-M3-Plus launched as an evidence-grounded medical model
summary: Baichuan AI introduced Baichuan-M3-Plus, a new medical large model focused on minimizing hallucinations with evidence grounding. The company claims a benchmark hallucination rate as low as 2.6% and says usage cost is reduced by 70% versus the previous generation.

title: "Hai Na Bai Chuan" program offers free Baichuan-M3-Plus API for healthcare service providers
summary: Baichuan AI launched the "Hai Na Bai Chuan" initiative to provide free permanent access to the Baichuan-M3-Plus API for institutions serving medical professionals. The program is aimed at clinical decision support and medical education, positioning the model as a low-hallucination medical AI foundation.

title: Baichuan4-Turbo released for enterprise scenarios
summary: Baichuan AI newly released Baichuan4-Turbo, a model optimized for high-frequency enterprise use cases. The company says it improves usability by more than 10% over Baichuan4, lowers deployment and inference costs, and delivers faster first-token and token streaming speeds.

title: Baichuan4-Air released with MoE architecture
summary: Baichuan AI newly released Baichuan4-Air, described as its first MoE model using a proprietary PRI architecture. It is positioned as an ultra cost-effective and fast enterprise model, with inference pricing as low as 0.98 li per 1,000 tokens.

title: Baichuan-M3 open-sourced as a commercially usable medical reasoning model
summary: Baichuan AI announced Baichuan-M3 as an open-source, commercially usable medical model with strong reasoning and low hallucination performance. The company highlights 235 billion parameters, top open-source HealthBench results, and full consultation-style questioning capability.

title: Baichuan-M2 open-sourced as a deployable medical reasoning model
summary: Baichuan AI released Baichuan-M2 as an open-source, commercially usable medical reasoning model that can be deployed on a single RTX 4090 GPU. It features 32 billion parameters, 32K context length, and strong HealthBench performance.

title: Baichuan-M1 released as the first medical-enhanced model
summary: Baichuan AI introduced Baichuan-M1 as its first medical-enhanced model and made it open-source for commercial use. The model has 14 billion parameters, was trained on 20T of medical-enhanced corpus, and supports 32K context.

title: Baichuan2-13B released as a multilingual open commercial model
summary: Baichuan AI released Baichuan2-13B as an open-source, commercially usable multilingual model. The company reports major gains over the previous 13B generation, including improvements in math, coding, safety, reasoning, and semantic understanding.

title: WorldWise Enterprise LLM Platform 2.5 announced
summary: 01.AI announced WorldWise Enterprise LLM Platform 2.5, positioning 2026 as a critical year for enterprise deployment of multi-agent systems. The update is presented as a major milestone for enterprise AI adoption.

title: 01.AI launches “Super Employee” enterprise AI agent
summary: 01.AI launched “Super Employee,” an enterprise AI agent aimed at delivering measurable business value. The announcement frames it as a new phase for enterprise AI agents focused on practical business outcomes.

title: 01.AI's LLM One-box Solution Machine receives CAICT top-level certification
summary: 01.AI announced that its LLM One-box Solution Machine received top-level certification from CAICT. The certification highlights external validation of the company's enterprise AI infrastructure offering.

title: Yi-Lightning open-source Mixture-of-Experts LLM highlighted as global SOTA
summary: 01.AI featured Yi-Lightning as a global state-of-the-art Mixture-of-Experts large language model and identified it as open-source. This is a model announcement emphasizing performance leadership and open availability.

2025-07-31 StepMesh: A Communication Library for Attention-FFN Disaggregation This article delves into the technical details and design choices of StepMesh, sharing our insights and considerations regarding the communication requirements for AF Separation systems.
2025-07-24 Step-Audio 2: Breakthrough in End-to-End Speech Modeling Technology Step-Audio 2 is an end-to-end multimodal large language model engineered for industrial applications

2025-05-30 Discrete Distribution Networks：A Novel Generative Model with Simple Principles and Unique Properties Discrete Distribution Networks (DDN) is a novel generative model that adopts a simple yet fundamentally different approach to mainstream generative models for modeling target distributions.

2025-05-30 Open-Reasoner-Zero: An Open Source Approach to Scaling Up Reinforcement Learning on the Base Model In this blog, we introduce Open-Reasoner-Zero, the first open source implementation of large-scale reasoning-oriented RL training on the base model focusing on scalability, simplicity and accessibility.
